# Section One

This is the first section of a large note. It contains enough text to trigger
multiple chunks during the indexing process. The chunker should split this note
into multiple pieces based on heading boundaries and paragraph lengths.

# Section Three

Third section. This note is designed to be longer than 4000 characters total
to ensure the chunker produces multiple chunks. Each section has substantial
body text.
